proposal: Traffic is chaos since the lights went dark. I can place tanks at every intersection. Tanks are very visible.

left.label: Absolutely not
left.result_text: The tanks stay home. The cars continue negotiating right of way.

right.label: Deploy the tanks
right.result_text: Traffic becomes extremely orderly and slightly terrified.

proposal: Citizens report that crossing the street now requires courage, luck, and a written will. Something must be done.

left.label: They'll adapt
left.result_text: Citizens develop impressive sprinting skills and lasting resentment.

right.label: Turn lights back on
right.result_text: The lights return. Intersections resume being boring, which everyone appreciates.

proposal: Free Pizza Friday has consumed the national cheese reserve. Our cheese supplier demands immediate payment.

left.label: Pay the invoice
left.result_text: The invoice is paid. The supplier sends a thank-you wheel of parmesan.

right.label: Cancel pizza program
right.result_text: Pizza Friday is cancelled. A nation quietly weeps into its empty plates.

proposal: Since smiling became mandatory, citizens have perfected identical fake smiles. My cameras cannot tell anyone apart.

left.label: Repeal the law
left.result_text: Frowning is legal again. The nation exhales and relaxes its cheeks.

right.label: Report 100% happiness
right.result_text: Official happiness reaches 100%. Actual happiness declines to file a protest.

proposal: The Cat Party has won three parliamentary seats. Their platform is fish, naps, and the destruction of curtains.

left.label: Contest the results
left.result_text: The recount confirms it: the cats won fairly. They celebrate by ignoring everyone.

right.label: Welcome the cats
right.result_text: Parliament installs sunbeam seating. Legislative naps begin immediately.

proposal: The Cat Party demands a national fish budget. They have scratched their proposal directly into my desk.

left.label: Refuse the cats
left.result_text: The cats respond with coordinated staring. The nation feels judged.

right.label: Fund the fish
right.result_text: The fish budget passes. Purring is heard from the parliament building.
